name: DeCoin Flow
description: DeCoin Flow (DCF) is an AI-enabled, regulated, and decentralized payment infrastructure designed to facilitate fast, low-cost, and compliant multi-chain stablecoin settlements. By combining predictive AI smart routing with non-custodial smart-contract execution, DCF bridges the gap between traditional fiat and stablecoin liquidity. The platform delivers practical payment rails capable of supporting large-scale enterprise commerce, merchant acceptance, and retail treasury operations with a focus on institutional-grade security.
